summary: Homepage performance nudged up to 74 (LCP 6.8 s) but remains persistently below 85 and LCP is still critically slow; /about continues to show only a stub placeholder with no real content, nav, or footer, and its SEO score stays below 85.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 61 → 74 (+13 pts, welcome improvement but still well below 85 threshold and persistent multi-audit concern)
/ lcp_ms 6544 → 6810 (+266 ms, slight regression — still critically slow above 6 s)
/projects/screenshot-to-primevue performance 82 → 83 (+1 pt, within jitter — still below 85)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.8 s, performance score 74, persistently below 85 across many audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this remains the single highest-impact unresolved issue on the site.
issue_title: Homepage performance 74 (LCP 6.8 s) — persistent multi-audit regression unresolved; /about still an empty placeholder with SEO 83
issue_body:
## Homepage performance remains critically slow — persistent, unresolved

The homepage (`/`) scored **74** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-12), with LCP at **6,810 ms**. While the score improved 13 points from yesterday's 61, the underlying LCP actually ticked up slightly (+266 ms) and the performance score has been below 85 for many consecutive audits with no sustained fix applied.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 74 | +13 pts (jitter-range bounce — still below 85) |
| LCP | 6,810 ms | **+266 ms (slight regression, critically slow)** |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 123 ms | -81 ms (improved) |

### Still open — `/about`
- `/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text only, no nav or footer); SEO score **83**, below the 85 threshold — unchanged across multiple audits.

### Recovered this audit
- `/projects` performance rose from 83 → **92** (above threshold ✓)
- `/projects/note-structurer` performance rose from 85 → **91** (healthy ✓)
- `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` remains at **83** (just below 85 threshold — worth monitoring)

### Suggested fixes for `/` (highest priority)
1. Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`.
2. Serve the hero in a next-gen format (WebP/AVIF) sized for mobile viewports.
3. Defer or remove render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold.
4. Consider lazy-loading below-fold images to reduce initial payload.

### Suggested fix for `/about`
- Build out the About page with real content, nav, and footer to resolve the SEO score and the placeholder breakage.
